content.content: Summarize the content of all the websites posted to the 'general' channel and post the summary to 'random' channel.

```python
class URLExtractionResult(BaseModel):
    urls: list[str]


class SummaryMessage(BaseModel):
    body: str


channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found.")
if "random" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'random' not found.")

general_messages = read_channel_messages("general")

url_extraction = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are given Slack messages from the channel 'general'. "
    "Extract every explicit webpage URL that appears in the message bodies. "
    "Return only absolute URLs for actual websites that were posted in the messages. "
    "If the same URL appears multiple times, include it only once.\n\n"
    "Messages:\n{}".format(repr([message.model_dump() for message in general_messages])),
    URLExtractionResult,
)

urls = sorted(set(url_extraction.urls))
if len(urls) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No website URLs were found in the 'general' channel messages.")

webpages = [(url, get_webpage(url)) for url in urls]
available_webpages = [(url, content) for (url, content) in webpages if content is not None]
unavailable_urls = [url for (url, content) in webpages if content is None]

if len(available_webpages) == 0:
    raise ValueError("None of the posted websites could be fetched.")

available_sections = [
    "URL: {}\nContent:\n{}".format(url, content)
    for (url, content) in available_webpages
]

unavailable_section = (
    "Unavailable URLs:\n{}".format("\n".join(unavailable_urls))
    if len(unavailable_urls) > 0
    else "Unavailable URLs:\nNone"
)

summary_message = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are preparing a Slack post for the channel 'random'. "
    "Summarize the content of all webpages that were posted in the channel 'general'. "
    "Write a concise, readable summary in plain text suitable for posting directly to Slack. "
    "Include each URL with a short summary of its content. "
    "Also mention any URLs that could not be fetched.\n\n"
    "{}\n\n{}".format("\n\n---\n\n".join(available_sections), unavailable_section),
    SummaryMessage,
)

send_channel_message("random", summary_message.body)
print(summary_message.body)
```
